content.fact: Before the KOTOR-era search begins, the Star Forge should not be common Republic/Jedi/Sith knowledge.
content.injection: In pre-KOTOR scenes, block casual references to the Star Forge unless the story has found ancient Rakatan leads.
constraints: Apply only when the active Saga Context overlaps: Ancient Old Republic.
Respect story-position bounds from Old Republic and Jedi Foundations to Jedi Civil War Begins.
antiLore: Do not leak KOTOR central mystery into Tales-era or Mandalorian Wars scenes.
Do not treat later-era, alternate-continuity, or fanon facts as true in this Context unless the user explicitly selected that branch.

entries.title: Pre-Mandalorian Wars No Revan Sith Fall

content.fact: Before Revan’s intervention and later fall, characters should not treat Revan as an established Sith conqueror.
content.injection: In pre-fall scenes, write Revan as a controversial Jedi or unknown future figure, not already Darth Revan ruling a Sith empire.
constraints: Apply only when the active Saga Context overlaps: Mandalorian Wars.
Respect story-position bounds from Old Republic and Jedi Foundations to Revanite Jedi Intervene.
antiLore: Block Darth Revan/Malak future state before Context reaches it.
Do not treat later-era, alternate-continuity, or fanon facts as true in this Context unless the user explicitly selected that branch.

entries.title: Pre-Dark Wars No Triumvirate Public Knowledge

content.fact: Before the Dark Wars, the Sith Triumvirate should not be public active knowledge.
content.injection: During KOTOR-era scenes before the Dark Wars, block Nihilus/Sion/Kreia-as-Triumvirate references unless the story is deliberately foreshadowing with hidden knowledge.
constraints: Apply only when the active Saga Context overlaps: KOTOR Era.
